top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan-Led Group Plan Sale of Qualtrics’ Hung Debt at Year End
top_signals.summary: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. is planning to offload about $5.3 billion in financing for software firm Qualtrics International Inc. later this year in a bid to shift the hung debt off their books.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Stuck in distribution’: Bitcoin slips below $63,000 as analysts warn rallies are being sold, not bought
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin dropped below $63,000 as analysts warn of a distribution phase dominating accumulation appetite amid institutional outflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: First Brands Wins Second Chance to Pursue Liquidation Plan
top_signals.summary: Bankrupt auto-parts maker First Brands can make a second attempt to win court approval for a creditor vote of a proposal to raise money through lawsuits against the company’s former top officers and lenders, a judge said Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Boots in Talks About Possible $10 Billion Sale, FT Says
top_signals.summary: The owner of Boots is talking to parties including the billionaire Weston family and Australian pharmacy group Sigma Healthcare about a $10 billion sale of the UK health and beauty retail business, according to the Financial Times.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX’s $1.78tn IPO asks investors to buy Musk’s moonshots
top_signals.summary: Public markets asked to price in advances in AI, Starlink and space-based computing long before lift-off
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Postmodern to Master his rivals on the Knavesmire
top_signals.summary: WE Look north to York this Saturday, where there is a strong card of competitive action on the Knavesmire to get stuck into.
